domain_name.description: The unique name for the Elasticsearch domain you are creating.

elasticsearch_version.description: The version of Elasticsearch to deploy. If not specified, the latest version is used.

tags.description: A map of key-value pairs to tag the domain with, useful for categorizing and organizing resources.

access_policies.description: The access policies for the Elasticsearch domain.

advanced_options.description: Advanced options for the Elasticsearch domain.

advanced_security_options.type: list(object({enabled: bool, internal_user_database_enabled: bool, master_user_options: list(object({master_user_arn: string, master_user_name: string, master_user_password: string}))}))

auto_tune_options.type: list(object({desired_state: string, rollback_on_disable: string, maintenance_schedule: list(object({cron_expression_for_recurrence: string, start_at: string, duration: list(object({unit: string, value: number}))}))}))

cluster_config.description: Cluster configuration for the Elasticsearch domain.
cluster_config.type: list(object({dedicated_master_count: number, dedicated_master_enabled: bool, dedicated_master_type: string, instance_count: number, instance_type: string, warm_count: number, warm_enabled: bool, warm_type: string, zone_awareness_enabled: bool, cold_storage_options: list(object({enabled: bool})), zone_awareness_config: list(object({availability_zone_count: number}))}))

cognito_options.type: list(object({enabled: bool, identity_pool_id: string, role_arn: string, user_pool_id: string}))

domain_endpoint_options.type: list(object({custom_endpoint: string, custom_endpoint_certificate_arn: string, custom_endpoint_enabled: bool, enforce_https: bool, tls_security_policy: string}))

ebs_options.type: list(object({ebs_enabled: bool, iops: number, throughput: optional(number), volume_size: number, volume_type: string}))

log_publishing_options.type: list(object({cloudwatch_log_group_arn: string, enabled: bool, log_type: string}))

timeouts.type: object({create: optional(string), update: optional(string), delete: optional(string)})
